**Considering Tool Access**

I'm currently focused on evaluating the tools at my disposal. I'm carefully considering how different tools could be best applied, from file viewers to more general terminal commands. I'm aiming for an efficient and effective utilization strategy for each one, especially for broad-spectrum tools.

ArtifactMetadata.Summary: Detailed implementation plan covering the live true ending menu, dev console aliases, door valve adjustments, staircase shaft extension, camera clipping, tactical pistol model, bandage mechanics, and performance optimizations.

args.CodeContent:
# Implementation Plan - Gameplay Polish, Bug Fixes & Live Main Menu

This plan outlines the design and steps to address the remaining bugs, polish the visual and audio elements of the game, and enhance performance.

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT]
> - **Staircase ceiling & walls extension**: We are enclosing the staircase shaft to prevent seeing the black void. This will make the stairs look like a fully built concrete stairwell.
> - **Valve wheel centration**: We are moving the door valve wheel to the center of the door and doubling its size (0.24 radius instead of 0.12) to match standard submarine/bunker hatch aesthetics.
> - **WebGL performance optimization**: We will pre-create and cache all standard Three.js materials (`wallMat`, `floorMat`, `ceilingMat`, etc.) and the muzzle flash point light. This will completely eliminate performance drops during shooting and floor transitions.

## Proposed Changes

### 3D Engine & Collision (`app.js`)

#### [MODIFY] [app.js](file:///C:/Users/m3615/samosbor_game/app.js)

##### 1. Camera Clipping
- Change the near clipping plane of the `THREE.PerspectiveCamera` in `init3D` from `0.1` to `0.02`. This allows the player to get extremely close to walls and doors without clipping through them.

##### 2. Material Caching & Performance Optimizations
- Introduce a global `cachedMaterials` object.
- Initialize all standard game materials inside `generateProceduralTextures()` or `init3D()` once using cached textures.
- Replace `new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial(...)` calls in `buildFloor` and `addVolumetricHandle` with references to `cachedMaterials`.
- Pre-create `shootFlashLight` as a global `THREE.PointLight` with 0 intensity, and simply toggle its intensity on shot instead of adding/removing light sources on every frame.

##### 3. Staircase Shaft Fixes (Salat Green Lamp & Emptiness)
- Extend the staircase walls (`shaftL`, `shaftR`, `shaftB`) from height `5.0` (centered at `baseY - 2.5`) to height `10.0` (centered at `baseY`). This encloses the entire stair shaft from floor to floor.
- Add a new ceiling slab `stairsCeiling` directly over the staircase opening at `baseY + 5.0 + 0.1` spanning from `z = -42` to `z = -49.6`.
- Shift the staircase lamp position from `z = -44` (floating) to `z = -45.8` (flush with the new ceiling center).

##### 4. Centered Door Valve Wheel
- In `addVolumetricHandle()`, change the position of the handle meshes from `X = 0.42` to `X = 0.0`.
- Scale up the handle dimensions:
  - Torus radius from `0.12` to `0.24`
  - Spoke length from `0.24` to `0.48`
  - Shaft and cylinder radii proportionally.

##### 5. Detailed Tactical Pistol Model
- Add front/rear sights with neon green tritium dots (MeshBasicMaterial 0x39ff14).
- Add a black cylinder inside the muzzle tip representing the barrel bore.
- Add an ejection port cutout detail on the slide.
- Add textured grip panels on both sides of the handle (using rougher charcoal metal material).
- Add a curved metallic trigger inside the guard.

##### 6. Bandage Healing Mechanics
- Add `bandages: 0` to `state`.
- Implement `useBandage()` function:
  - Play fabric wrapping sound using Web Audio API synthesis (two consecutive noise wraps with bandpass filter sweep).
  - Restores 35% health (caps at 100%).
  - Logs feedback to the game console.
  - Updates the HUD and inventory displays.
- In `distributeLoot()`, add a 20% chance to find a bandage when searching.
- Register keybinding checks (`KeyH` or `KeyB` to heal) and action button events.

##### 7. Dev Console Aliases and Default Case
- Add Russian aliases in `executeDevCommand` (e.g. `тп` -> `tp`, `лечить` -> `heal`, `бог` -> `god`, `патроны` -> `give ammo`, `записки` -> `give notes`).
- Add a `default` case to print an unknown command warning to the developer.

---

### True Ending Live Menu (`app.js` & `index.html`)

#### [MODIFY] [index.html](file:///C:/Users/m3615/samosbor_game/index.html)
- Add the Bandage button inside the HUD action grid next to the mask and water button.
- Add a bandage inventory field to the Bag/Notes modal.

#### [MODIFY] [app.js](file:///C:/Users/m3615/samosbor_game/app.js)
- Rewrite `animateMenuNature()` to support:
  - **Day/Night Cycle**: Smooth 20-second day/night transition using linear interpolation between four sky/ambient keyframes (Sunrise, Day, Sunset, Night).
  - **Growing Trees**: Maintain an array of trees that grow from small seedlings to full-scale swaying trees in 40-60 seconds.
  - **Children Playing**: Periodically spawn child silhouettes that walk and bounce along the mathematical ellipse curve of the grassy hill.

## Verification Plan

### Automated/Developer Commands
- Open the dev console (Ctrl+Shift+~) and try Russian commands:
  - Type `помощь` to verify the command list.
  - Type `лечить` to verify health recovery.
  - Type `тп 1300` to teleport.
  - Type `дать записки` to verify note unlock.
  - Type `achievement unlock awakened` to verify transition to the True Ending screen.

### Manual Verification
- **Visuals**: Walk up to stairs and inspect the ceiling and walls. Confirm there is no black void above the stairwell.
- **Door Wheel**: Inspect hermetic doors. Confirm the valve wheel is centered and significantly larger.
- **Pistol Model**: Verify the gun model features tritium dots, ejection port, grip panels, trigger, and barrel hole.
- **Bandages**: Search apartments until a bandage is found. Hurt yourself (by walking into toxic/radiation zones) and press the bandage HUD button or `H`. Verify health increases and the bandage wrapping sound plays.
- **Performance**: Move around, shoot, and descend floors. Confirm there are no micro-stutters or frame drops.
- **True Ending Menu**: Unlock the Awakened ending and watch the main menu. Verify the sky colors change, trees grow, and children run over the hill.

## Open Questions

- Do you have any specific key preference to use bandages? I plan to bind it to `KeyH` (Heal) and `KeyB` (Bandage) by default.
args.Description: Create implementation plan covering all gameplay polish, bug fixes, and live main menu changes
